overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Viking-themed action game showing a character exploring a snowy coastal mountain landscape at night under the aurora borealis. The character traverses a wooden dock, walks along the snowy shore, and ascends a steep mountain path.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden dock on frozen fjord under aurora borealis

events.description: camera pans upward to view the aurora borealis shimmering in the night sky
character begins walking forward along the wooden dock toward the shore

agents.ego_description: standing on wooden dock gazing up at the aurora borealis and distant snowy mountains, then walking toward the shore

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming a pier extending over frozen water
green and blue northern lights shimmering across the night sky
snow-covered peaks visible across the frozen fjord
small cluster of buildings with warm lights on the opposite shore
icy water surface between the dock and distant mountains

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wooden dock at night with a Viking character standing before a vast frozen fjord. The aurora borealis illuminates the sky above snow-covered mountains, while a distant settlement glows on the far shore. The character gazes upward at the lights before beginning to walk along the dock.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition from wooden pier to snowy coastal valley

events.description: character steps off wooden dock onto snow-covered ground
terrain becomes more rocky as character approaches mountain base with torch lights visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking from the wooden dock onto snowy terrain and proceeding toward the mountain valley entrance

entered.detail: vertical wooden posts marking the edge of the dock structure
snow-dusted boulders lining the shoreline path
small warm lights marking the path ahead through the valley

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the wooden dock past weathered posts, then steps onto snow-covered ground. The frozen fjord falls behind as rocky outcrops appear along the path. Distant torch lights mark the way forward through the coastal valley toward the mountain base.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep snowy mountain ascent between rock walls

events.description: character begins ascending steep snowy slope using hands to climb
aurora borealis becomes more prominent in the sky as elevation increases

agents.ego_description: climbing steadily up the steep snow-covered mountain path between rocky cliffs, using hands for support

entered.detail: vertical rock face rising beside the snowy path
snowy summit visible ahead through the mountain pass

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a steep snowy mountain path flanked by towering rock walls. The wooden structures of the dock are left far below as the climb continues. The aurora borealis reappears prominently in the sky above as the character progresses higher into the mountain pass, with snowy peaks visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a quiet coastal dock into a steep, ascending mountain climb under a shimmering night sky. It begins with a Viking character standing on a wooden dock before a vast frozen fjord, gazing up at the aurora borealis and a distant, glowing settlement. As the character moves forward, the wooden planks give way to snow-covered ground and rocky outcrops, leaving the frozen waters behind in favor of a coastal valley marked by distant torch lights. The scene then shifts into a rigorous ascent up a steep snowy path flanked by towering rock walls, with the dock receding far below. Finally, the camera climbs higher into a mountain pass where the aurora borealis dominates the sky above the surrounding snowy peaks.
